top.description: Heavy-weight white crew neck tee — substantial fabric that holds its shape rather than draping. Boxy cut sitting just at the hip. The quality of the fabric is visible even at a distance

bottom.description: Wide-leg charcoal trousers with a pressed front crease — high-waisted, clean break at the ankle. The structure is carrying most of the visual weight in this look

shoes.description: Black leather derby shoes — round toe, minimal stitching, matte finish. Exactly the right weight and formality to ground the wide trousers without over-dressing them

accessories.impact: No accessories — the restraint is intentional and it's working. Adding anything here risks cluttering the visual silence this outfit has carefully built

opening_line: Quiet, considered, and almost flawless — the tuck will seal it.
fit_notes: High contrast executed correctly — white tee anchored by dark trousers and black shoes creates a clean vertical line. The wide leg requires the boxy top to balance; a slim fit here would make the bottom half look disproportionate. This reads as intentionally quiet to anyone paying attention.
one_improvement: Half-tuck the tee — the full untuck creates a horizontal break that interrupts the vertical line. A clean half-tuck or full tuck resolves this and sharpens the whole silhouette by about 30%
